proposal1.heroHeadline: Tourismalaysia is losing 1,000 hours a year preparing proposals. Here's why it matters.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, Tourismalaysia spends hours on manual proposal creation. With our system, generate in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each issue below represents a continuous drain on Tourismalaysia's resources.

problems.title: Wasted Hours
problems.description: Tourismalaysia staff spend over 1,000 hours annually on proposals. That's 1,000 hours not spent building partnerships.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Manual proposal creation costs Tourismalaysia over $50,000 a year in labor. Every dollar spent is a dollar not invested in marketing initiatives.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Brand inconsistency costs Tourismalaysia credibility. Each inconsistent proposal erodes trust with potential partners.

problems.title: Missed Deals
problems.description: Slow proposal turnaround leads to lost deals. Every delayed response is a potential partner choosing a competitor.

problems.title: Complex Tracking
problems.description: Tracking proposal progress is time-consuming and error-prone. Missteps cost Tourismalaysia vital insights into client engagement.

problems.title: Overlooked Data
problems.description: Manual processes mean missed data insights. Tourismalaysia loses critical information that could enhance service offerings.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces these losses with efficient, automated excellence.

solutions.title: Rapid Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. Our system completes them in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual processes lead to branding errors. Our system ensures every proposal aligns with Tourismalaysia's brand.

solutions.title: Cost Effective
solutions.description: High labor costs drain resources. Our system reduces manual labor, saving money for strategic investments.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: Tracking proposals manually is a hassle. Our system offers real-time tracking and insights.

solutions.title: Data-Driven Insights
solutions.description: Manual data collection misses insights. Our system captures and analyzes data to enhance service offerings.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Tourismalaysia's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Tourismalaysia around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Tourismalaysia.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Visibility with Tourismalaysia's Expertise
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will implement a comprehensive marketing strategy tailored to enhance Acme Corp's global reach and impact.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant losses due to untapped markets and inefficient marketing strategies.

problems.title: Low Brand Awareness
problems.description: Every day your brand is not recognized is potential revenue lost. You are missing opportunities to connect with a wider audience.

problems.title: Ineffective Online Presence
problems.description: Your current digital footprint results in potential clients leaving without engagement. This is crucial revenue lost daily.

problems.title: Underutilized Social Media
problems.description: With each missed post engagement, you lose the chance to convert followers into loyal customers.

problems.title: Limited Market Penetration
problems.description: Every unentered market is a direct loss of potential revenue streams and growth opportunities.

problems.title: Weak Customer Retention
problems.description: Losing repeat business means losing a significant portion of your potential revenue and customer loyalty.

problems.title: Inefficient Campaigns
problems.description: Running campaigns without clear metrics results in wasted budget and missed opportunities for revenue growth.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Tourismalaysia offers strategic solutions to address these challenges and turn losses into opportunities.

solutions.title: Enhanced Digital Marketing
solutions.description: Boost your online presence and convert visitors into customers with effective digital strategies.

solutions.title: Social Media Management
solutions.description: Engage and grow your audience through targeted social media campaigns.

solutions.title: Market Expansion Strategy
solutions.description: Enter new markets with a structured plan to maximize your reach and revenue.

solutions.title: Customer Retention Programs
solutions.description: Improve customer loyalty and repeat business with customized retention strategies.

metrics.label: Increase in revenue from new markets.
